prompt: When blocker plus range edge align, choose raise.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when range and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits because the blocker and range edge line up well enough to pressure capped continues.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise because the blocker and the stronger range story align, so aggression can pressure capped continues instead of just calling.
